description: Maintained Oscar Piastri historical events for optional fan-daily 'on this day' context.

events.title: Oscar Piastri takes his first Formula 1 podium at the Japanese Grand Prix
events.summary: Piastri finished third at Suzuka, behind Max Verstappen and Lando Norris, for his first career F1 podium.

events.title: Oscar Piastri wins the Qatar Grand Prix Sprint
events.summary: Piastri won the Qatar Sprint ahead of Max Verstappen and Lando Norris, his first F1-format victory.

events.title: Oscar Piastri wins his first Formula 1 Grand Prix in Hungary
events.summary: Piastri won the Hungarian Grand Prix, leading a McLaren one-two with Lando Norris second.

events.title: Oscar Piastri wins the Azerbaijan Grand Prix
events.summary: Piastri took his second Formula 1 Grand Prix victory in Baku, ahead of Charles Leclerc and George Russell.
